title: Reputation-Guided Security Model for Data Center Protection
description: A flowchart illustrating how a reputation-based system dynamically assesses and protects data center resources based on the trustworthiness of incoming requests.
relationships: Incoming request is evaluated by the Reputation Engine
Engine checks internal reputation score and external threat feeds
Based on reputation score, the Policy Enforcement Point routes the request
High-reputation requests gain direct access to resources
Low-reputation requests are blocked or diverted to a Quarantine Zone for analysis
